message:
test(wave-24): add 40 unit tests for plan/mod, epoch

plan/mod.rs: 17 tests covering PlanId/PlanNode/PlanError/PlanDag/EClassId/
ENode/EClass/EGraph trait impls (Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/Ord/Hash), accessors,
node variants, and e-graph operations.
epoch.rs: 23 tests covering EpochId/EpochConfig/EpochState/Epoch/
SymbolValidityWindow/BarrierTrigger/BarrierResult/EpochTransitionBehavior/
EpochError/EpochContext/EpochPolicy trait impls, format strings, constructors,
and validation edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
